title: Baroque Works Sets a Trap
description: On pages 9–12, baroque works sets a trap as mr. 3 and his partners move into position as the giants’ duel and the Straw Hats’ journey become part of a trap.
scene: Baroque Works Sets a Trap. Mr. 3 and his partners move into position as the giants’ duel and the Straw Hats’ journey become part of a trap. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Gegya Gyagya Gya!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Aren't you a lively one!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I haven't had any guests in a long time!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Woah.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Giant DORRY

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Whoa! You're HULUGGEE! Are you human?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Gegyagya Gyagya! I'm Elbaf's strongest warrior, Dorry!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It's...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: A giant!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: This is my first time seeing one...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Though I have heard rumours about them...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Let me invite you folks to my place!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Agh!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: He spotted me...

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Brogy the giant's home

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Gaba Bababa Baba!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: There! It's all cooked so eat up!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: We're not hungry.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Pssst. There're skeletons all around us...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I know...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: No need to decline out of modesty! Eat as much as you want! Dinosaur meat's especially delicious, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It seems we're going to be eaten too...

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: It's only too obvious that he's trying to fatten us up so he can enjoy human meat...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's fine, we're not up for much of a meal.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: We're a too young to die...

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: But maybe that's the best time to eat humans...

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Umm, Mr. Brogy... May I ask you one question...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Chomp!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hmm? What is it, girl?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: H-How long does it t-take for the log pose to finish recording on this island...?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: One full year.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: So take it easy while you're here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Gababa Bababa!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on baroque works sets a trap. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
